title: What nickname do you think Mari would give you
display_title: What nickname do you think Mari would give you
wikitext:
[]: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Aug 06, 2017 9:54 pm We all know Mari Makinami has a knack for giving people nicknames based on a person's traits or personality, such as her calling Shinji puppy boy and Asuka princess. So what sort of nickname do you think Mari would give you if you were in the EVA universe? I think for me personally, she would either call me Dracula or Skeletor. Mainly because how I'm into anything with skulls and spikes on it, or stuff that has a badass gothic look to it.

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 06, 2017 10:05 pm I'd be 太りババ (Futoribaba), "Fat Old Bitch". Oh, wait. That's what Asuka would call me.

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by Zeruss » Mon Aug 07, 2017 9:49 pm I think we'd get along great, so she'd be lenient and simply call me "Clueless Buffoon".

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Aug 07, 2017 10:17 pm "Juice Cup" Can I just say I've been waiting forever for the perfect opportunity to use this emoticon?

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Aug 08, 2017 5:26 am ^ You could have used it in your topic about Shinji as an example of what you think WILLE will do to him once he gets back with Asuka and Rei.

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Aug 08, 2017 11:57 am Let's not turn this into a topic about me, m'kay? Wille will probably do a lot of awful things to him, but I doubt they'd torture him.

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Aug 08, 2017 12:40 pm No one's ever managed to find a nickname for me... I guess, given my age, she'd just go with "gramps".

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Aug 08, 2017 4:31 pm pwhodges wrote: No one's ever managed to find a nickname for me... I guess, given my age, she'd just go with "gramps".

[]: Re: What nickname do you think Mari would give you?             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Aug 08, 2017 4:50 pm I'm pretty sure that in the Eva universe I'll be just a minor character with no connection to the main plot so I'll have no nickname.

So what sort of nickname do you think Mari would give you if you were in the EVA universe? I think for me personally, she would either call me Dracula or Skeletor.
